_comment: Committed routing index for the code-review gate (analog of plan_review/criteria_routing.json). Top-level _-prefixed keys are stripped by registry.routing_index(). The secret-detection / high-critical-security keys ship blocking_enabled=false (advisory in v1); WS5 flips exactly those two to true (the deterministic gitleaks/semgrep detectors, fail-closed). An overlay's optional nit_suppressed:true (story grusome-uncheerful-nematode) demotes an advisory finding whose criteria are ALL nit-suppressed from the surfaced set to dropped (code_review_decide), reducing docs/llm-prompts nit noise; it does not affect blocking.

deletion-impact._comment: story f983: CONTENT-triggered (not glob) overlay — registry.content_triggered_overlays fires it when the diff removes a def/class/signature, so applies_to is empty. ADVISORY (blocking_enabled=false): a now-dangling reference is a coach-not-block finding, verified in Pass-2 and decided in Pass-3 like every other overlay.

scope-intent._comment: story 3c5d: CONTENT-triggered (not glob) overlay — fires ONLY when >=1 ticket resolves from the commit's rebar-ticket: trailer, so applies_to is empty. It reviews the diff against the UNION scope/AC of those tickets (injected as its per-overlay ticket_context; base + every other overlay stay ticket-blind). ADVISORY (blocking_enabled=false): scope drift is a coach-not-block finding, verified in Pass-2 and decided in Pass-3 like every other overlay.

public-exposure-without-auth._comment: task 830a: deterministic public-exposure signals (0.0.0.0/0 ingress, public IP, internet-facing LB, non-loopback compose bind) on the *.tf / docker-compose diff — the code-level counterpart to plan-review T10. ADVISORY (blocking_enabled=false, fail_mode=open): a match is a coach-not-block coverage finding, since boundary controls (gateway/mTLS/network policy) may live outside the diff. NOT under the fail-closed rebar.builtin.security. prefix.

conflict-markers._comment: story da25: deterministic, polyglot detector for leftover VCS merge-conflict markers (<<<<<<< / >>>>>>> / diff3 |||||||) committed into source. Runs in opengrep `generic` mode over every file type. ADVISORY (blocking_enabled=false, fail_mode=open): a match is a coach-not-block coverage finding; an abstain (no engine on PATH) never blocks — no new BLOCK source. applies_to empty so it considers every changed file (matches are diff-scoped by location in run_detectors). NOT under the fail-closed rebar.builtin.security. prefix. The FP-prone bare `=======` separator is deliberately NOT matched.
